name: Chicken Piquant
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup nonfat vegetable broth, low sodium
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the broth to a boil in a large skillet or Dutch oven.
2. Add wine, soy sauce, ginger, sugar, and oregano to the boiling liquid.
3. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Arrange chicken breasts in a shallow baking pan.
5. Pour the sauce over the chicken.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 45 minutes.
7. Turn the chicken over and bake an additional 45 minutes, or until cooked through.
8. If desired, thicken the sauce with a cornstarch slurry before serving.
This dish is extremely good and very quick and easy to prepare!
